tasks.subject: Task 1: Scaffold flow-forge lib + host registration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New Nx lib `tommy-signal-forms-flow-forge` exporting a placeholder `FlowForge`, lazy-loaded at `/flow-forge`, building cleanly.

**Files:** generate lib; create `src/lib/flow-forge.ts`; modify `src/index.ts`, `tsconfig.base.json`, `apps/tommy/host/src/app/experiments/registry.ts`.

**Verify:** `pnpm nx build tommy-host`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge", "tsconfig.base.json", "apps/tommy/host/src/app/experiments/registry.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx build tommy-host", "acceptanceCriteria": ["host build succeeds", "/flow-forge lazy-loads FlowForge", "project.json mirrors multi-step-form"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Port .ui-* UI layer + flow-shell + CDK
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Shared `.ui-*` layer in the lib, `@angular/cdk` installed, host renders the lib `ui.css`.

**Files:** `src/lib/ui/{ui.css,field-error.ts,error-banner.ts,step-indicator.ts,flow-shell.ts,*.spec.ts}`; modify `apps/tommy/host/project.json`, `apps/tommy/host/src/styles.css`, `package.json`.

**Verify:** `pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-forge`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/ui", "apps/tommy/host/project.json", "apps/tommy/host/src/styles.css", "package.json"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-forge", "acceptanceCriteria": ["@angular/cdk@21.2.x added", "ui.css in host build styles", "ported ui specs pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Engine contract types + schema helpers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `flow-def.ts` contract + `schema-helpers.ts` (applyFeature), unit-tested.

**Files:** `src/lib/engine/{flow-def.ts,schema-helpers.ts,schema-helpers.spec.ts}`.

**Verify:** `pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-forge`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/engine/flow-def.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/engine/schema-helpers.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/engine/schema-helpers.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-forge", "acceptanceCriteria": ["defineStep compile-time slice match", "applyFeature requires iff mandatory", "FlowEnvelope defaults to FeatureMap"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: createWizard() headless controller
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure-signals wizard controller (phase/step/gate, frozen-snapshot), DOM-free tests; ported from multi-step-flow.ts:55-241.

**Files:** `src/lib/engine/{wizard.ts,wizard.spec.ts}`.

**Verify:** `pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-forge`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/engine/wizard.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/engine/wizard.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-forge", "acceptanceCriteria": ["valid advances/clears, invalid freezes+resets+no-advance", "back from first -> intro", "attempted only after validate", "freezeBanner navigates+sets banner"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: MitID plumbing (redirect, state store, mitid)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ExternalRedirect seam, versioned single-use FlowStateStore, mitid url/callback contract; tested without navigation.

**Files:** `src/lib/engine/{external-redirect.ts,flow-state-store.ts,mitid.ts,flow-state-store.spec.ts,mitid.spec.ts}`.

**Verify:** `pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-forge`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/engine/external-redirect.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/engine/flow-state-store.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/engine/mitid.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/engine/flow-state-store.spec.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/engine/mitid.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-forge", "acceptanceCriteria": ["round-trip + single-use", "null on version mismatch/absent", "same-origin built/foreign rejected", "parseCallback extracts fields"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: FlowBackend service + fixtures registry
tasks.description:
**Goal:** One injectable FlowBackend (GET options/POST submit by slug) reading FLOW_FIXTURES; synthetic fixture exercises 200/202/422.

**Files:** `src/lib/engine/{flow-backend.ts,flow-backend.spec.ts}`.

**Verify:** `pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-forge`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/engine/flow-backend.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/engine/flow-backend.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-forge", "acceptanceCriteria": ["loadOptions resolves features/terms", "submit returns outcome; signature flips 202->200", "unknown slug rejects"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: flow-runner rendering + load
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Engine component renders intro/done + active step (NgComponentOutlet fixed input set) + loads options. Submit in Task 8.

**Files:** `src/lib/engine/{flow-runner.ts,flow-runner.html,flow-runner.spec.ts,testing/test-flow.ts}`.

**Verify:** `pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-forge`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/engine/flow-runner.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/engine/flow-runner.html", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/engine/flow-runner.spec.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/engine/testing/test-flow.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-forge", "acceptanceCriteria": ["intro renders + Start loads step 0", "step gets field/showErrors/data", "next/back nav + indicator/banner render"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: flow-runner submit (200/422/202)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** onSubmit() via signal-forms submit(): 200->done, 422->mapped errors+navigate, 202->snapshot(state nonce)+redirect seam. Adapt multi-step-flow.ts:148-190.

**Files:** modify `src/lib/engine/{flow-runner.ts,flow-runner.spec.ts}`.

**Verify:** `pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-forge && pnpm nx build tommy-host`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/engine/flow-runner.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/engine/flow-runner.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-forge && pnpm nx build tommy-host", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ok->done+confirmation", "422->banner message+navigate", "202->snapshot+redirect same-origin with state", "AOT build passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Newsletter flow (minimal) + shared TOS step
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Minimal flow (contact+prefs+tos) proving low per-flow cost + shared tos-step.

**Files:** `src/lib/steps/tos-step.ts`; `src/lib/flows/newsletter/{model.ts,schema.ts,fixtures.ts,steps/contact-step.ts,steps/prefs-step.ts,def.ts,schema.spec.ts}`.

**Verify:** `pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-forge`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/steps/tos-step.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/flows/newsletter"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-forge", "acceptanceCriteria": ["schema requires name/email + required terms", "emptyModel bridges terms map->array", "newsletterFlow complete FlowDef 3 steps"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: FlowForge launcher (gallery + callback)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Launcher: gallery, mounts <flow-runner>, provides FLOW_FIXTURES, handles MitID callback (restore/cancel) on boot.

**Files:** `src/lib/flow-registry.ts`; modify `src/lib/flow-forge.ts` (+`flow-forge.html`), `src/lib/ui/ui.css`; test `src/lib/flow-forge.spec.ts`.

**Verify:** `pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-forge && pnpm nx build tommy-host`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/flow-registry.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/flow-forge.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/flow-forge.html", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/flow-forge.spec.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/ui/ui.css"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-forge && pnpm nx build tommy-host", "acceptanceCriteria": ["gallery cards + select mounts runner", "FLOW_FIXTURES provided", "cancelled callback restores+notice; bad state ignored"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Docs + full local CI
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Lib README + root README row + green full suite.

**Files:** `libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/README.md`; modify `README.md`.

**Verify:** `pnpm check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/README.md", "README.md"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["lib README covers split/contract/how-to-add", "root README has Flow Forge row", "pnpm check passes"]}
```
